title: Gently Roasted Korean Avocado Bowl
description: A low-calorie, nutritious bowl featuring roasted avocado and namul, perfect for a healthy lunch or snack. This dish combines the creaminess of avocado with the crunch of roasted vegetables and the spiciness of Korean chili flakes.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the avocado in half and remove the pit.
Place the avocado on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, Korean chili flakes, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate pan, heat the soy sauce mixture over medium heat and add the namul.
Stir-fry the namul for 2-3 minutes until it is well coated with the sauce.
To assemble the bowl, place a scoop of brown rice on the bottom, followed by a roasted avocado half, and top with the namul mixture.
Garnish with additional Korean chili flakes and sesame seeds if desired.
